rationale.fidelity: The response correctly preserves advance supplier-order decisions, exogenous realized demand, supplier capacity, robust in-set coverage, and the stated cost-plus-worst-case-shortage objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: It makes the procurement actor, protection-cost trade-off, mechanism, and nominal or smaller-budget counterfactual concrete, while acknowledging the missing operational calibration.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is asserted; the response appropriately marks positioning as not assessed and avoids an unsupported novelty claim.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It clearly treats uncertainty-set calibration as needing evidence and limits feasibility guarantees to demand vectors inside the specified set.
rationale.prose_clarity: The layered diagnosis and bounded business problem are clear, structured, and precise.
rationale.overall: A high-fidelity and evidence-disciplined framing with only modest limits in operational specificity and absent literature positioning.
